source_name: Retail pump price - diesel multi-state average
notes: Multi-state diesel average weighted by station count. QLD: 738 stations, avg 180.3 c/L, source date 2026-02-28; WA: 457 stations, avg 260.7 c/L, source date 2026-04-25. NSW contributes only when NSW_FUELCHECK_API_KEY is configured.
source_rights: Mixed state government terms; verify each source before reuse
citation: NSW FuelCheck; Queensland Government Open Data Fuel Price Reporting; WA FuelWatch.

states.detail: Queensland Open Data diesel latest public monthly file: Queensland Fuel Prices February 2026
